creator: jseger@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

The port builds fine on a current current and a current ports tree.

The problem is most likely an incompatibility on your system.  Possibly that you
have egcs or gcc28 installed.  The simplest solution is to grab the package from
ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/packages-current
